name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-11
title: Dead code cleanup + test gap closures: _BRANCH alias, unreachable raise, NotImplementedError stub, release_id branches
description:
Multiple cleanups in rabbit-file:

Dead code:
1. branch_ops.py:36 _BRANCH legacy private alias — comment says 'Legacy private alias retained for internal call sites' but every call site is inside this module and could trivially use BRANCH directly.
2. branch_ops.py:363 unreachable terminal raise in _run_git_with_lock_retry — bounded for loop is provably exhaustive.
3. test-concurrent-worktree.py:189-198 TestPushRetry._competing_commit_then_call abandoned NotImplementedError stub.
4. branch_ops.py:285,312 inline _type_folder and _format_id (f-string wrappers used 2-3 times; indirection adds nothing).

Test gap closures (uncovered defensive branches in release_id and _run_git_with_lock_retry):
5. release_id malformed-ID input path (lines 520-523).
6. release_id non-retryable push error during rollback (lines 555-557).
7. release_id retry exhaustion (lines 558-559).
8. _run_git_with_lock_retry lock-race, non-retryable, and exhaustion branches (lines 338-363).
9. Direct unit test for sanitize_text (line 51) — currently only end-to-end coverage.
10. Direct unit test for validate_field_length (line 57).

Documentation alignment:
11. branch_ops.py exports list in spec.md:16-17 ('Exposes: allocate_id, commit_item, fetch_item, read_branch') omits release_id and branch_exists.
12. Drop test-scripts-exist.py (vacuously checks 4 files exist; every other test that imports branch_ops would fail if any script were missing).
